step_results.output_excerpt:
{"action":"read_range","end_line":30,"excerpt":"1|# RustClaw Skill Development Rules / RustClaw 技能开发规则
2|
3|本文件给所有参与本仓库的 agent 使用。目标是统一技能接入流程，确保“代码上传后编译通过即可允许启用”。  
4|This file is for all agents working in this repository. The goal is to standardize skill integration so that “once code is pushed and compilation passes, the skill can be considered allowed/enabled”.
5|
6|## Design Context
7|
8|### Users
9|- 主要用户是“不懂技术的普通小白”。  
10|  The primary user is a non-technical beginner.
11|- 他们希望通过可视化界面完成部署后的日常使用、状态查看、渠道接入和基础排障，而不是阅读日志、编辑配置文件或依赖命令行。  
12|  They want to operate RustClaw through a visual console for daily use, status checks, channel setup, and basic troubleshooting instead of reading logs, editing config files, or using the command line.
13|- UI 应优先降低理解门槛，让用户先建立“我看得懂、我敢点、我不会弄坏”的信心。  
14|  The UI should reduce cognitive load first and build the feeling of “I understand this, I can click this, and I probably will not break it.”
15|
16|### Brand Personality
17|- 气质关键词：可靠、克制、简洁简单。  
18|  Personality keywords: reliable, restrained, simple.
19|- 产品语气应稳定、直接、友好，不卖弄技术感，不制造压迫感。  
20|  The product voice should feel steady, direct, and friendly without showing off technical complexity or creating intimidation.
21|- 即使底层是 agent runtime / multi-channel / task orchestration，前端表达也应尽量像“清晰的控制面板”，而不是“工程师调试工具”。  
22|  Even though the backend is an agent runtime with multi-channel orchestration, the frontend should feel like a clear control console rather than an engineer-only debugging tool.
23|
24|### Aesthetic Direction
25|- 采用双主题。  
26|  Support both light and dark themes.
27|- 默认设计判断优先服务非技术用户的可读性、层级清晰度和表单易用性，而不是追求“酷炫”或“黑客感”。  
28|  Design decisions should prioritize readability, hierarchy clarity, and approachable forms over “coolness” or “hacker vibes.”
29|- 避免高饱和霓虹色、大面积纯黑终端风、过强攻击性的红绿对比，以及会让用户联想到复杂运维工具的视觉语言。  
30|  Avoid neon saturation, large pure-black terminal aesthetics, overly aggressive red/green contrast, and visual language that feels like an intimidating ops-only tool.","mode":"head","path":"AGENTS.md","requested_n":30,"resolved_path":"/tmp/rustclaw-workspace/AGENTS.md","start_line":1,"total_lines":198}
